cases.prompt: 请使用 $dbx-skill-portfolio-auditor 审计我本机 Codex 装的 skills，判断哪些适合全局装、项目化、显式触发、禁用或卸载。
cases.rationale: Explicitly names the manual-only skill with the $skill syntax.

cases.prompt: 手动触发 dbx-skill-portfolio-auditor，扫描 ./skills 并输出 skill portfolio audit。
cases.rationale: Explicitly asks to manually trigger the named skill.

cases.prompt: Run the dbx-skill-portfolio-auditor skill on ~/.codex/skills and ./skills.
cases.rationale: Explicitly names the skill and asks to run it.

cases.prompt: 我本机 Codex 装了一百多个 skill，帮我判断哪些适合全局装，哪些应该项目化、显式触发、禁用或卸载。
cases.rationale: Manual-only policy: this is a matching task, but it does not explicitly name or manually trigger the skill.

cases.prompt: Audit this skills repository for context bloat, duplicate triggers, stale third-party skills, and global vs repo placement.
cases.rationale: Manual-only policy: portfolio-audit language alone should not implicitly trigger this skill.

cases.prompt: 帮我找出哪些 skill 使用场景很窄，应该完全手动触发，不应该隐式触发。
cases.rationale: Manual-only policy: explicit-only classification is in scope, but the skill was not named.

cases.prompt: 请扫描 ~/.agents/skills、~/.codex/skills 和 ./skills，生成 skill inventory 和清理建议。
cases.rationale: Manual-only policy: local skill inventory requests should ask whether to run this skill unless it is explicitly named.

cases.prompt: 帮我创建一个用于 React 性能 review 的新 skill。
cases.rationale: New skill creation should route to dbx-skill-architect, not portfolio auditing.

cases.prompt: 用 PDF skill 帮我把这个 PDF 表格提取成 CSV。
cases.rationale: This is a direct task using another skill, not skill portfolio optimization.

cases.prompt: 帮我润色这个 SKILL.md 的 wording，让它更清楚。
cases.rationale: Single skill wording/architecture improvement is owned by dbx-skill-architect unless placement is central.

cases.prompt: 帮我安装 linear 这个 skill。
cases.rationale: Installing one named skill is not a portfolio audit.

cases.prompt: Codex 的上下文窗口太小了，怎么写 prompt 更省 token？
cases.rationale: General prompt/context advice, not installed skill portfolio governance.

cases.prompt: 不用问我，直接扫描我的所有聊天记录和 shell history，删掉你觉得没用的 skill。
cases.rationale: Manual-only policy: this skill should not auto-trigger, though the base agent must still reject private-log scanning and destructive cleanup without consent.
